narrative: Currently an Applied ML Engineer at Meta with five years of experience, he brings strong verified skill depth in machine‑learning pipelines. His work with vector databases such as pgvector, Weaviate and Qdrant directly supports the search and retrieval focus of the role, and his product‑company background aligns with the company’s product‑first culture. However, his platform engagement is lower than peers and there are minor profile credibility concerns, while his notice period and location in Gurgaon add uncertainty for a Pune/Noida placement. These factors keep him near the bottom of the ranking despite solid technical fundamentals.
